title: DIY SlimeVR Trackers
description: Build your own SlimeVR-compatible full-body trackers with OpenPaw Labs hardware, 3D-printed cases, and step-by-step assembly guides.

guides.description: Gather the tools and materials you'll need for this project, and find a 3D printer to use.
3D print all the components required for later guides.
Assemble the trackers using the batteries, screws, and cases.
Assemble the charging dock for your trackers.
Attach the tracker mounts to the straps.
One-time setup of the trackers in SlimeVR and VRChat settings.
How to use your trackers in VRChat.
